title: Office Machinery and Equipment Rental and Leasing

labor_share.method: QCEW 2024 private total annual wages at 532420 ($1,080,918,386) x benefits multiplier 1.4294 [ECEC private-industry total comp $46.60/hr / wages $32.60/hr = 1.4294 (March 2026 reference period)] / SUSB 2022 receipts at 532420 ($3,089,912,000). Vintage mismatch: 2024 wages over 2022 receipts, stated. Level: 6-digit. Harmonized to IPS basis ÷1.3407 (median of 65 dual-method codes).

occupations.title: Laborers and Freight, Stock, and Material Movers, Hand
Mobile Heavy Equipment Mechanics, Except Engines
First-Line Supervisors of Retail Sales Workers
Bus and Truck Mechanics and Diesel Engine Specialists

n_band.derivation: margin 0.3000 (margins.json[532]: ESTIMATE: rental & leasing is asset-heavy with no clean Damodaran bucket (REITs 43.79% overstates operating rental); 30% chosen as a round mid-point before deriving results); revenue/employee $429,871 (SUSB 2022 receipts/employment at 532420); class <5: 308 firms, avg revenue/firm $566,036 (class receipts/firms), implied EBITDA $169,811 -> out of $1-10M band; class 5-9: 57 firms, avg revenue/firm $1,632,877 (class receipts/firms), implied EBITDA $489,863 -> out of $1-10M band; class 10-19: 37 firms, avg revenue/firm $5,089,676 (class receipts/firms), implied EBITDA $1,526,903 -> IN $1-10M band; class 20-99: 44 firms, avg revenue/firm $16,108,523 (class receipts/firms), implied EBITDA $4,832,557 -> IN $1-10M band; class 100-499: 10 firms, avg revenue/firm $80,048,200 (class receipts/firms), implied EBITDA $24,014,460 -> out of $1-10M band; class 500+: 16 firms, avg revenue/firm $70,307,750 (class receipts/firms), implied EBITDA $21,092,325 -> out of $1-10M band; n_band = 81
n_band.margin_source: ESTIMATE: rental & leasing is asset-heavy with no clean Damodaran bucket (REITs 43.79% overstates operating rental); 30% chosen as a round mid-point before deriving results
